blended.narrative: Kimberley Alpine Resort is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,000 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 52°F.
